productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Turquoise blue round neck top made of 100% cotton, with crystal encrusted branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Ladies, time to stock up your wardrobe with basic off-duty essentials like this top from united colors of benetton. Perfect for layering, or for a laid-back casual look styled minimalistically with jeans, this top is sure to become a love-forever piece in your closet. For the best layering effect, wear this under a structured blazer and interesting denims. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
